title: Add Talking with Unity to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Game engines can talk now
gist.blurb: Talking with Unity just landed in the greenhouse. It's a voice AI assistant for Unity projects, because your NPCs have been quiet for too long.
gist.summary: Added 'Talking with Unity' to the community showcase, bringing voice AI, speech recognition, and text-to-speech capabilities to Unity projects.
gist.impact: Game developers have a new reference app for integrating voice-driven interactions directly into their Unity games.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot wearing a tiny gamer headset and holding a microphone, interacting with a classic 3D game engine cube. Represents voice AI meeting game development.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gamer headset and holding a microphone, hovering next to a glowing 3D game engine cube. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gamer headset and holding a microphone, hovering next to a glowing 3D game engine cube. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
